abilities.description: Add an amount of {C} equal to the number of time counters on CARDNAME.
Time travel. Activate only as a sorcery. (For each suspended card you own and each permanent you control with a time counter on it, you may add or remove a time counter.)

effect.description: Time travel. Activate only as a sorcery. (For each suspended card you own and each permanent you control with a time counter on it, you may add or remove a time counter.)
effect.name: TimeTravel

replacements.description: CARDNAME enters tapped with a time counter on it.
